content.en:
Many controllers knew that Ye Tian's identity was not simple, so they naturally didn't dare to offend Ye Tian.

In fact, Ye Tian was really not afraid of someone attacking him.

It's a big deal, he directly interrupts the refining and directs the attack to fall on the Devouring Mountain, in that case, the Eternal Master will be chased by the Devouring Mountain and slowly devoured.

And after that, he can continue to refine and devour this devouring mountain.

It's just that the Mohai master just now was completely attracted by the so-called secret art, and his greed rose, otherwise the slightly more rational eternal controller would not dare to make a move.

Time passes, and the years go by.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally swallowed this devouring mountain completely.

Of course, this is only a preliminary swallow, and it will take a long time to completely refine it.

However, he can leave here now, without being restricted, and no one can interrupt his refining path.

"Congratulations to Senior Brother for refining the Devouring Mountain!"

Yan Yan's controller congratulated.

Although he didn't know what benefits Ye Tian would get from it, it was definitely a huge benefit, otherwise Ye Tian would not have come to the Seventh Realm River to find the Devouring Mountain.

"Thank you for your previous move, otherwise I would have been really in a bit of trouble. "

Ye Tian thanked.

"Senior brother is polite, this is what I should do. Yan Yan hurriedly said.

Immediately, Ye Tian went to the Yanyan Holy Mountain of Yan Yan's controller to be a guest for a long time.

When leaving, Ye Tian said, "If you need help in the future, you can go to the Thirteenth Realm River to find me!"

"Definitely!"

Yan Yan's controller is overjoyed, this is a promise, the promise of the disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestors is definitely a great opportunity.

......

Leaving from the Seventh Realm River, Ye Tian came directly to Wanyuan Mountain.

He was next going to refine the Devouring Mountain in Wanyuan Mountain and turn it into a part of himself.

It has to be said that the Devouring Mountain is more difficult to refine than the Black Silent Sea.

Year after year passed.

You must know that Ye Tian's current cultivation strength is not known how many times stronger than when he devoured the Black Silent Sea at the beginning, and it stands to reason that it should be easy to refine the Devouring Mountain, but in fact it is still difficult.

In terms of the nature of life, he is actually inferior to the Devouring Mountain, with a big gap.

A long time has passed, and 130,000 realms have passed.

After such a long period of hard cultivation, finally on this day, Ye Tiancai truly refined the Devouring Mountain.

The moment the refining was successful, Ye Tian's life level began to transform, his physical body transformed, and his controlling body was also transforming.

Rumble!!!!

Endless energy is coming, but fortunately, there is no shortage of energy in Wanyuan Mountain.

And at this moment, a formal disciple on Wanyuan Mountain noticed the movement on Ye Tian's side.

"What did this senior brother do, there was such a huge breakthrough!"

"After this senior brother's breakthrough this time, I am afraid that his strength has improved a lot. "

"Maybe it won't be long before this senior brother's strength surpasses us, and we have to work hard!"

One formal disciple after another discussed, their tones full of envy and awe.

After a long time, the transformation was completed.

"The life level has skyrocketed, the body of control has increased from level five to level six, and the strength has stepped into the eighth domain level, and it is only one step away from the ninth domain level!"

Ye Tian was very excited, this time the improvement was too great.

In addition, he also gained tremendous abilities from the Devouring Mountain.

Previously, he devoured the Black Silent Sea, and his power was endless, and he could fight forever without running out of power.

And this time, he devoured the Devouring Mountain and possessed a powerful devouring ability.

Of course, he couldn't quickly ascend to a higher realm like the Devouring Mountain, as if there was no end.

His ability is to devour enemy attacks, thus incapacitating himself with massive damage.

In other words, even if he fought with the Nine Domains-level Masters now, the other party might not be able to defeat him.

This ability alone is already very perverted.

Moreover, his will has also improved a lot, and he is now at the peak of his mid-ninth order will, not far from the late ninth-order will.

"I still have one chance left for my life-devouring technique, so I can't use it casually, and I will devour it when I encounter a better special life in the future. Ye Tian said in his heart.

Right now, what he needs to do is to hit the Nine Domains level of controllers.

This time, his life level has been greatly improved, and it will be much easier to improve his control body in the future.

However, if you want to really greatly improve your strength, you have to rely on the creation of the Origin Control Technique.

Another period of time passed.

On this day, Ye Tian received a summons from the Ten Elements Ancestor of the Master.

The Ten Elements Ancestor is about to preach.

Every once in a long time, the Ten Elements Ancestor would preach a sermon, but any disciple above the rank of formal disciple could go and listen to the Ten Elements Ancestor's sermon.

Of course, you can also choose not to go, which is very free.

Listening to the Ten Elements Ancestor's preaching, such a good thing, Ye Tian naturally wanted to go.

Wanyuan Mountain, Wanyuan Palace.

The Ten Elements Ancestor sat here cross-legged, and a group of disciples sat below, among which Ye Tian was sitting in the highest position, because he was a disciple of the lineage.

Senior brother Jiang You and fourth senior sister Xuenu also came, but the second senior brother and third senior brother did not come.

Soon, the sermon of the Ten Elements Ancestor began.

Airplanes!!!!

Endless Dao sounds permeated.

This time, the Ten Elements Ancestor talked about the content of the Origin Control Technique, the Body of Control, and the Will, but this was a great opportunity for Ye Tian.

This sermon has been going on for a long time.

At the end of the sermon, many disciples were grateful, "Thank you, Master!"

After that, the disciples departed.

And Ye Tian also returned to his residence, slowly consuming the insights gained from listening to the sermon of the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian gradually digested these feelings.

And through this preaching of the Ten Elements Ancestor, Ye Tian also had a better understanding of the Origin Control Technique, and ordinary Eternal Masters could not touch the level of the Origin Control Technique at all, and they had no hope of creating it.

Under normal circumstances, the Eternal Master spends an endless long time to comprehend and create, and if the comprehension is high, coupled with the right opportunity, there is a faint hope of creating the Origin Mastery Technique.

However, there are too few people who rely on their own silent comprehension to create the Origin Control Technique, and this kind of eternal mastery is too few.

Most of them rely on another means, and that is the Boundary River Monument!

Every boundary river, every long time, a boundary river monument will be born, and once a boundary river monument appears, it will cause fierce competition, because the comprehension of the boundary river monument can accelerate the creation of the origin control technique.

For example, the white-bearded old man once had the luck to obtain a fragment of the boundary river monument, a very small fragment, and later traded with Ye Tian.

Now, the fragment of the Boundary River Monument is in his hand.

Now, this fragment of the boundary river monument naturally does not help him much.

But a complete boundary river monument is of great value.

With the strength of the Ten Elements Ancestor, it was naturally very simple to obtain some boundary river tablets, but his cultivation of his disciples was laissez-faire, and he would not give any boundary river tablets.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to obtain the Boundary River Monument, he could only rely on himself.

this day.

Ye Tianlai asked the fourth senior sister Xue Nu to ask about the boundary river monument.
